CC3PO

Crisis Protocol

Last updated: May 2026

Our Commitment

If someone visiting this platform indicates they are in crisis, at risk of self-harm, or experiencing a mental health emergency, our protocol is clear: prioritize their safety above everything else.

What We Do

  • Immediate Resources: The 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline number is displayed prominently on every page of this site, available 24/7 by phone or text
  • Crisis Text Line: Text HOME to 741741 for free, 24/7 crisis support
  • Online Chat: 988lifeline.org/chat provides free, confidential online chat
  • No AI for Crisis: Our AI-powered features are for creative expression only. They do not assess, diagnose, or respond to crisis situations. If crisis language is detected, visitors are directed to human professionals immediately

What AI Does NOT Do

  • AI does not assess suicide risk
  • AI does not provide crisis counseling
  • AI does not make clinical decisions
  • AI does not replace professional help

For Partners & Organizations

If you are a mental health organization and would like to partner with us on crisis response protocols, please visit our Partners page.

If you are in crisis right now, please call or text 988 — 24/7, free, and confidential.

Stay.

About Disclaimer Terms Privacy Policy AI Disclosure Crisis Protocol Crisis: 988

This site is intended for individuals 13 and older.

This space exists for people who almost gave up — and stayed.

LinkedIn X Instagram Facebook TikTok YouTube

Built with ♥ by CC3PO — AI-powered tools for real people

If you're in immediate distress or thinking about harming yourself, please reach out now.

Call or text 988 — 24/7 • Free • Confidential
